subtasks.description: Extract all party names, their defined roles in the contract, and contact addresses from the multi-party contract document. Return structured JSON with array of parties, each containing name, role(s), and address fields.

plan.cost_rationale: Single extract subtask (not multiple) because all requested fields (party names, roles, addresses) are extracted from one document in one unified pass. Small tier is appropriate—this is straightforward structured field extraction from a document with clear delimiters (party sections, role definitions, contact details). No cross-source reconciliation or complex inference needed."
